name: Feature request

## Summary

One or two sentences describing the feature.

## Problem or need

What user need, organizational goal, or workflow does this support?

## Desired behavior

What should the user be able to do?

## Page or area affected

Where should this feature live?

## Requirements

List known requirements, constraints, or expected behavior.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] 
- [ ] 
- [ ] 

## References

Add examples, screenshots, Figma links, docs, or related issues.

## Priority

- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High
- [ ] Urgent
